headline: Co-founder and CSO at StackHawk focused on developer-first application and API security.
title: CSO, Co-Founder
confidenceNote: StackHawk, LinkedIn, and security-industry author/speaker pages consistently identify Scott Gerlach as StackHawk co-founder and CSO.
bioMarkdown: Scott Gerlach is StackHawk's co-founder and Chief Security Officer, working on developer-first AppSec and API security. He brings long-running security leadership experience from StackHawk, SendGrid/Twilio, and GoDaddy, making him a strong match for secure-by-default AI engineering, DevSecOps, and product security conversations.
